turns.text: Hi, Brightwater Family Dentistry — how can I help?
Hi dear, I think one of my crowns came loose.
I'm sorry — that can be uncomfortable. We hold same-day slots for situations like this. What's the best first name for me?
Margaret.
Thanks Margaret — I'm texting you a secure intake link to confirm. Please fill in your details there rather than over the phone.
Brightwater Family Dentistry — how can I help?
My kid chipped a tooth. Do you take Delta?
I'll text you our current insurance list — coverage changes quarterly. First — is the pain severe?
Pretty bad, yeah.
We have a same-day slot at 11am — sending you the intake link now.
Brightwater Family Dentistry.
My tooth, very pain. Hot, cold, very pain.
I'm so sorry. That's something the dentist will need to look at — we have same-day slots. Can I text you the booking link?
Yes please.
Sending now.
Brightwater Family Dentistry.
So I had this cleaning last year and... do you do veneers?
We do cosmetic. Let me text you the consult booking link — you can pick the date that works.
Brightwater Family Dentistry.
Are you an AI?
I'm the AI assistant for Brightwater. I help with scheduling and routing your call. How can I help?
Fine. I need a cleaning.
Sending you our booking link now.
